creator: cnehren+freebsd-bugs@pobox.com
text:
I should note that I have the following in /usr/local/etc/ports.conf:

*: TEX_DEFAULT=texlive

I'm not sure if this is relevant, though.  My understanding of the TeX ports innards only extends to knowing that I want texlive since it's actively maintained.  Should I remove this now that texlive is the default?
